validation_rules.requirement: Estate-sale and auction sourcing trips outside Palm Springs city limits
validation_rules.notes: Reimbursed at IRS standard mileage rate; log the sale or auction house name

validation_rules.requirement: Meals with active buyers, designers, or consignment partners
validation_rules.notes: Client name and purpose required; alcohol-heavy charges need Ashley's sign-off

validation_rules.requirement: Duplicate uploads for the same purchase
validation_rules.notes: Only one valid receipt allowed per transaction

validation_rules.requirement: Receipts with unreadable or missing totals
validation_rules.notes: Resubmit with a legible receipt or bank statement match

validation_rules.requirement: Receipts submitted more than 30 days after purchase
validation_rules.notes: Policy violation — submit promptly for accurate monthly books

context: Rules used to validate showroom, sourcing, and restoration-related reimbursement receipts for Bell Modern's two-person team (Ashley Bell, Jenna Phillips).
